headline: How The Apple (AAPL) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Ambitions And Leadership Transition
summary: Apple’s modeled fair value has been updated from US$297.88 to US$310.51, a modest shift that signals a recalibration of expectations rather than a wholesale rewrite of the story. The move aligns with recent analyst commentary that considers Apple’s AI roadmap, product refresh cycle, leadership changes, and debates around iPhone demand, China exposure, and cost pressures. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving narrative and what to watch to stay informed ahead...

headline: S&P 500 Dividend Yield Hits 1.08%. The Lowest Payout Rate Since the 1800s Is a Retirement Red Flag.
summary: The S&P 500 dividend yield has fallen to 1.08%, a level the index has not seen since the 1800s. For retirees who built their income plan around stock dividends, that number is the financial equivalent of finding out the well in the backyard has gone dry while the water bill keeps climbing. I’ve been writing ... S&P 500 Dividend Yield Hits 1.08%. The Lowest Payout Rate Since the 1800s Is a Retirement Red Flag.

headline: Inside the Ambitious Plan That Actually Made Home Prices in Austin Affordable Again
summary: A decade of policy changes in the Texas capital set the stage for a construction boom. The result is that prices are down and sales are up. Other cities are taking notice.
